  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

BSW_BOSCH_STANDALONE_V1.0

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 795
Recv ID: 7B5
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 6B
Func Name: BSW
